rowLabels: Cash at End of Period (cash-flow statement)

metrics.label: Asset Turnover

basis.note: Asset turnover uses average assets for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.

metrics.note: Average-balance efficiency policy applied without ending-balance fallback.

basis.disclosureText: Book Value Per Share uses period-end shares outstanding.

metrics.label: Quick Ratio
metrics.note: Quick ratio excludes reported inventory from current assets.

metrics.label: Return on Assets

basis.note: ROA uses average assets for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.

metrics.note: Average-balance return policy applied without substituting ending-balance fallbacks.

metrics.note: Average-balance return policy applied without substituting ending-balance fallbacks.

metrics.label: Total Debt
metrics.note: Total Debt uses reported total debt when available, otherwise long-term debt plus short-term debt.

Cash at End of Period (cash-flow statement)

appendixSupportNotes: Appendix figures use FY2025 and FY2024.
Appendix rows follow the standard statement line set used throughout the report.
Cash-family labels follow the filing directly, and the cash-flow ending balance remains separate unless the filing presents the same concept on the balance sheet.
Cells marked "Not reported" mean the filing did not disclose the value for the periods shown and the report does not estimate it.
Asset Turnover: Asset turnover uses average assets for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.
Book Value Per Share: Book Value Per Share uses period-end shares outstanding.
Earnings Per Share (Diluted): Earnings Per Share (Diluted) uses diluted weighted-average shares from the income statement.
Return on Assets: ROA uses average assets for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.
Return on Equity: ROE uses average equity for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.
